title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.420 - Department to apply for and accept federal funds
text:
208.420.  Department to apply for and accept federal funds. — The department of social services shall make application for and accept such federal moneys as shall be awarded for the purpose of carrying out demonstration projects authorized under Title V of the Family Support Act of 1988.
(L. 1989 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 2 § 5) 
Effective 7-27-89
